name: popover
description: Floating content card anchored to a trigger element with two-pass measurement, screen-edge clamping, and optional arrow.

props.name: content
props.description: Content rendered inside the popover card.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element that opens the popover when interacted with.

props.name: placement
props.description: Preferred placement of the popover relative to the trigger element.

props.name: showArrow
props.description: When true, renders a directional arrow pointing toward the trigger.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controlled visibility; when provided the popover is fully controlled.

props.name: onVisibilityChange
props.description: Callback fired when the popover opens or closes.

props.name: contentStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the popover container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Stable selector used in automated tests.

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
examples.code:
// Right placement with long-press trigger
<Popover
  content={<HelpTooltipContent />}
  placement="right"
  trigger="longPress"
>
  <InfoIcon />
</Popover>

examples.label: Example 3
Example 4
examples.code:
// Left placement for a settings panel
<Popover
  content={<ColumnVisibilityPanel />}
  placement="left"
  testID="column-visibility-popover"
>
  <Button variant="ghost">Columns</Button>
</Popover>
